scenario_description: User asks agent to create a summary in Sheet2, but agent misunderstands and modifies Sheet1. User corrects.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Create a summary of total sales somewhere in the spreadsheet
That's not what I wanted. Please undo that. I need the summary on a NEW sheet called 'Summary', not on the existing sheet. Put 'Total Sales' in A1 and the sum of all Sales values in B1.
Also add 'Total COGS' in A2 and the sum of COGS in B2 on the Summary sheet. Save the file.

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl=pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/WeeklySales.xlsx'); print('PASSED' if 'Summary' in xl.sheet_names else 'FAILED')"
